caption: A video game of American football is shown from a wide aerial perspective on a green field with white markings. The scene features two teams: one in blue uniforms and another in white and red uniforms, including the Atlanta Falcons logo. Players are lined up for a play, with a quarterback in blue preparing to snap the ball. In the bottom-left corner of the screen, a picture-in-picture window shows a fair-skinned man with blond hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a white gaming headset. A scoreboard at the top displays "1st & 10", team logos, the score "0" for both teams, a game clock at "1:25", a play clock at "27", and a timer at ":09". The text "#ULTIMATE TEAM" is visible in the top-left and top-right corners. Across the sequence, the players shift slightly as the play begins, and the man in the inset window maintains a focused expression.
